result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Shows transitive package dependencies that can be removed

USAGE:
    snitch [PROJECT|SOLUTION] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    snitch Project.csproj
    snitch Project.csproj -e Foo -e Bar
    snitch Project.csproj --tfm net462
    snitch Project.csproj --tfm net462 --strict
    snitch Solution.sln
    snitch Solution.sln -e Foo -e Bar
    snitch Solution.sln --tfm net462
    snitch Solution.sln --tfm net462 --strict

ARGUMENTS:
    [PROJECT|SOLUTION]    The project or solution you want to analyze

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information                          
    -t, --tfm <MONIKER>        The target framework moniker to analyze          
    -e, --exclude <PACKAGE>    One or more packages to exclude                  
        --skip <PROJECT>       One or more project references to exclude        
    -s, --strict               Returns exit code 0 only if no conflicts were    
                               found                                            
        --no-prerelease        Verifies that all package references are not     
                               pre-releases                                     

COMMANDS:
    version    Prints the Snitch version number
